product_overview: Coturne is a roommate-matching web app that helps users create a profile, discover compatible roommates through swipe-based browsing, and communicate with mutual matches. It also includes an admin moderation area for reviewing sensitive profile approvals.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in securely
Complete a profile and onboarding preferences
Discover potential roommates and indicate interest or pass
Review mutual matches and continue conversations
Allow admins to approve or reject pending profile reviews

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can register, log in, and recover access to their account using email and password, with MFA verification when enabled.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Enter registration details -> Submit the sign-up form -> See account creation confirmation
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the authenticated home feed
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> Enter the 6-digit verification code -> See the authenticated home feed
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter the account email -> Request a password reset -> See reset request confirmation
Navigate to /reset-password -> Enter a new password -> Confirm the new password -> Submit the reset form -> See password reset success confirmation

features.name: User Onboarding
features.description: New users complete a multi-step onboarding process to provide identity and lifestyle preferences for roommate matching.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select identity and preferences -> Continue through each onboarding step -> Submit the profile data -> See onboarding completion confirmation

features.name: Matchmaking Discovery
features.description: Users browse roommate candidates in a swipe-style feed, review their compatibility, and express interest or pass.
user_flows: Navigate to /discover -> View a roommate profile card -> Swipe right to show interest -> See the next candidate card
Navigate to /discover -> View a roommate profile card -> Swipe left to pass -> See the next candidate card

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Users can manage their personal profile, update profile details, upload a photo, and configure preferences including MFA enrollment.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Review current profile details -> Update profile information -> Save the changes -> See updated profile data
Navigate to /profile -> Upload a profile photo -> Save the photo -> See the new profile image displayed
Navigate to /profile -> Review security preferences -> Start MFA enrollment -> Complete the setup steps -> See MFA enabled confirmation

features.name: Matches and Messaging
features.description: Users can review matched roommates and open conversations from their match list and inbox.
user_flows: Navigate to /matches -> Review the list of matched roommates -> Open a match profile -> See the associated conversation context
Navigate to /chats -> Review the message inbox -> Open a chat thread -> Read the conversation history -> Send a message -> See the message added to the thread

features.name: Admin Moderation
features.description: Admins review pending minor profiles and moderation reports, then approve or reject items from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Review pending profiles -> Approve a profile -> See the profile removed from the pending list
Navigate to /admin -> Review pending profiles -> Reject a profile -> See the profile removed from the pending list

features.name: Home Feed
features.description: Authenticated users land on the main home feed after logging in and can use it as the central entry point for the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the main home feed

routes.description: User login page with MFA TOTP verification
Manage profile, photo, 2FA MFA enrollment, and preferences
Multi-step user onboarding flow (identity, preferences, lifestyle)
Admin dashboard requiring AAL2 MFA verification for minor profile approvals and moderation reports

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login, Registration, Password Recovery, and MFA
user_interactions: If MFA enrolled, enter 6-digit TOTP code

features.name: User Onboarding
features.description: Multi-step process to gather user lifestyle preferences

known_limitations: CRITICAL TESTING REQUIREMENT: For all user registrations and logins in the test scripts, you MUST use the password 'StrongPassw0rd!123' (do not use password123 as Supabase will reject it). For registrations, append a random timestamp to the email to prevent email already exists errors.
